description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a modern, boxy silhouette and a predominantly black finish. The seat and backrest are divided into three distinct, rectangular cushions, all of which appear to be attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are rolled and slightly flared, featuring brown accent trim along the edges that adds a subtle contrast to the otherwise monochrome design. The legs are short, blocky, and wooden, barely visible beneath the base of the couch. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving the couch a sleek and contemporary appearance. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern black three-seater couch with rolled armrests, brown trim accents, and smooth, solid upholstery. Features attached seat and back cushions and short, block wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three attached seat and back cushions, rolled armrests with brown trim, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rolled armrest, the depth of the seat, and the short block leg beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, solid black backrest and the brown-trimmed armrest edges.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the rolled armrest and short block leg visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style wooden legs, exposed at the corners and minimally visible beneath the couch base.
attribute_armrest_design: Rolled and slightly flared armrests with brown accent trim along the front and top edges, matching the overall modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: High, attached, and divided backrest with three rectangular sections, each corresponding to a seat, and no visible tufting or decorative features.
